title: JavaScript Basics
description: Core language behavior, values, and everyday syntax.

questions.explanation: Arrays are objects rather than primitive values.

questions.prompt: A const binding prevents the properties of an assigned object from changing.
questions.explanation: const prevents reassignment of the binding, not mutation of the object.

questions.prompt: Which operator checks value and type equality?
questions.explanation: Strict equality, ===, compares without type coercion.
map creates a new array from the callback result for each element.

questions.prompt: Which values are falsy in JavaScript?
questions.explanation: Empty arrays are truthy; 0, empty strings, and null are falsy.
